Verbascum thapsus, also known as Mullein, is a biennial plant species that is native to Europe, Asia, and Africa. The health benefits of Verbascum thapsus include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which make it useful for treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The bioactive constituents of Verbascum thapsus include saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Verbascum thapsus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
